title: Hi-Spec 79pc Multi Screwdriver Bit Set and 1/4 inch Socket Set with Handles. Flexible Extension, Precision, Torx and Tamperproof 1/4 inch Hex Screwdriving Bit Accessories in a Case
features: Complete Multi Screwdriver Bit Set: Get precision, Torx, Hex, Pozidriv and Tamperproof Security types; covers a wide range of electronics, household and garage screwdriving repairs
12pc Socket Set and Ratchet Handle: The most commonly used 4 -13 mm 1/4” drive sockets for nuts and bolts; the thick grip ratchet handle with a 2-direction switch turns smoothly both sockets and bits
12pc Precision Screwdriver Bits for Detailed Fixes: Small screw driver bits ideal for delicate work on electronics, gadgets and intricate repairs; use with the slim handle for easy control
Flexible Extension for Hard-to-Reach Areas: Allows effortless access to deeply recessed screws and confined spaces; 150 mm soft extension shaft bends and flexes up to 90 deg
Magnetizer / Demagnetizer Tool: Instantly magnetize or demagnetize screwdriver bits; perfect for picking and positioning screws in assembly, repair and maintenance
description: Product Description Hi-Spec 79pc Multi Screw Driver Bits and 1/4 inch Socket Set with Handles Get precision, Torx, Hex, Pozidriv and Tamperproof Security types; covers a wide range of electronics, household and garage screwdriving repairs; a socket set and ratchet handle of the most commonly used sizes for nut and bolt turning Precision Screwdriving for Detailed Work Multi-Use Screw Bit and Socket Set Get the most out of your DIY projects with this all-in-one tool kit designed for precision and versatility. Complete types and sizes of the most popularly used screwdriver bits 1/4" drive socket set and a thick grip handle with smooth 2-direction ratcheting Hardened precision bits and a flexible extension for intricate and hard-to-reach work Complete in a portable box case for easy to carry and store; ideal for all that need on-the-go access Hardened S2 Steel Bits Precision Screwdriving for Detailed Work Includes 12 precision screwdriver bits and a slim handle with rotating cap end; ideal for work on electronics, gadgets and intricate repairs; made from long life S2 steel alloy Screwdriver Bits and Flexble Extension 1/4 inch Hex; Cr-V steel ; U4-U6-U8; Y1, Y2, Y3, Y4; Clutch Head 1, 2, 3; SL2, 3, 4, 5, 5.5, 6, 7 mm; M5, M6, M8; PH0, PH1, PH2, PH2, PH3; PZ0-1-2-2-3; H1.52-2.5-3-4-5-6-7-8; AD; T8-10-15-20-2- 27-30-35-40-45 Flexible extension and bit adaptor ; up to a 90 degree bend to reach awkward or deep positions Socket Set, Precision Bits and Ratcheting Handle 2-Direction Ratcheting Handle and a slim precision handle for rapid and fine screwdriving Magnetizing Tool for easy screw handling Precision S2 Steel Bits : PH00, PH0; SL1.0, 1.5, 2.0 mm; H0.7, 1, 1.3, 2, 3 mm; T8, T10 1/4" Sockets for nuts and bolts: 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13 mm Precision, Durability, and Versatility for Every Repair Job Whether its home improvement, DIY repairs, workshop projects or craftwork, Hi-Spec offers a quality and affordable range that encompass an entire scope of hand tools, power tools and toolkit sets.
